Programme

The Day's Schedule

Saturday, 5 September 2026

9:30 in the Morning
Arrival at Malate Church
Guests are warmly welcomed and seated in the historic Our Lady of Remedies Parish.
10:00 in the Morning
Vow Renewal Ceremony
Zenaida and Santiago renew their sacred promises before God, family, and beloved friends.
11:00 in the Morning
Post-Ceremony Photography
Portraits and cherished moments captured within the beauty of the heritage church.
12:00 Noon
Transfer to Reception
A short journey to a beautiful garden venue for the intimate luncheon celebration.
12:30 in the Afternoon
Garden Luncheon Reception
Lunch, heartfelt toasts, music, and a slideshow celebrating fifty extraordinary years of love.
3:30 in the Afternoon
Programme Closes
With full hearts, we bid a warm farewell — until the next gathering.
